data.title: Rocket Lab Stock Climbs As Biden Administration Plans To Ease Export Restrictions On Space Companies: What You Need To Know
data.description: Rocket Lab USA shares are getting a lift in Thursday's after-hours session following a report that the Biden administration will ease export restrictions on U.S. commercial space companies.

data.title: Western Alliance Stock Dips After Q3 Results: Here's Why
data.description: Western Alliance shares are trading lower after the company reported its third-quarter financial results after Thursday's closing bell.

data.title: Google Deal For Default Search On Apple iPhones 'Very Likely' To Be Banned, Jefferies Says
data.description: Google could "very likely" be banned from paying Apple to be the default search engine on iPhones, according to analysts at Jeffries. Here's what to know.
